name: OzAurum Resources Limited
summary: OzAurum Resources Limited, an exploration company, engages in the identification, exploration, and development of gold projects in Western Australia. It holds interests in the Mulgabbie project that covers a landholding of 67 square kilometers, as well as Patricia project comprising a 3.6 square kilometers landholding located north-east of Kalgoorlie. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Kalgoorlie, Australia.
